schubert_lyrical.description: Validation prompt 1, middle slice, polished preset. Based on one of the strongest saved prompt-search results.

recital_compact.description: Validation prompt 2, middle slice, polished preset. Tighter continuation behavior from a shorter source performance.

schubert_bright.description: Validation prompt 14, middle slice, polished preset. Broader pitch span and brighter continuation candidates.

recital_expansive.description: Validation prompt 23, middle slice, polished preset. Useful when you want a more spacious recital-style seed.
